# ID-35: Ledger mutation CLI — thin wrapper over task-view patch primitives

Replace inline-Python `/tmp/claude/*.py` scripts the Orchestrator currently writes per ledger mutation (open Task / flip status / append journal / Promote) with a deterministic CLI invocation. S64 investigation (ii) recommended HYBRID approach: thin `bun scripts/ledger-cli.ts` wrapper over the already-shipped task-view `applyPatches` + `atomicWriteFile` primitives (ID-20.8 WP5b PASS). Surface area: 10 subcommands (open-task, flip-task, flip-subtask, add-subtask, append-journal, promote, create-backlog, update-backlog, delete-backlog, show). 4 of 10 subcommands (open-task, create-backlog, delete-backlog, promote) require NEW record-level primitives gated on ID-20.15 (patch-surface extension) per S62E sub-o 2 audit §2 (docs/research/id-35-crossover-audit.md). REJECTED alternatives: (A) build CLI from scratch — duplicates ID-20.8 work; (B) adopt Taskmaster — fit-gap too wide (KH bare-digit IDs / sibling-only deps / MoSCoW+Ranked+Trigger priority / Promote primitive / <info added on…> blocks / 25-Subtask ceiling — none match TM). Sequence: AFTER ID-34 (CLI must honour field discipline) and AFTER ID-20.15 (record-level patch primitives shipped). ID-22 cross-ref sweep is INDEPENDENT of this CLI (102 files repo-wide per S62E sub-o 2 audit §4); CLI's LEDGER_DIR config helps post-relocation runtime consumers only. First dogfood: open this Task itself via the CLI's Promote primitive when implemented (self-bootstrapping).

## Subtasks

### ID-35.1: RESEARCH — Ledger primitive inventory + patch-server reuse audit + CLI surface RFC

- **Status:** pending
- **Dependencies:** _none_
- **Updated:** _unset_

Inventory the 10-12 ledger mutation primitives the Orchestrator currently performs (open Task / open Subtask / flip status / append journal / Promote / create-backlog / update-backlog / delete-backlog / add-subtask / show). Audit the task-view patch-server primitives (applyPatches / atomicWriteFile / detectSchema / generateMirrors / Zod re-parse) for reuse fit. Resolve workspace-dependency decision (file:../task-view vs vendored copy in lib/ledger/). Surface OQs: workspace dep vs vendor copy / direct applyPatches vs HTTP loopback / id-allocation strategy / commit-message convention / cross-ledger atomicity for Promote.

**Test strategy:** RESEARCH.md ≥ 600 lines covering: ledger primitive inventory (table form) / patch-server reuse audit / workspace dep decision / CLI command surface RFC / Promote two-phase commit semantics / ≥5 OQs surfaced for Liam ratification.

**Details:**
